title: Change Management
objective: Ensure all changes to systems, datasets, AI models, and configurations are risk-assessed, approved, and auditable.

title: AI System Lifecycle
objective: Institutionalize an AI SDLC embedding ethics, governance, and TEVV (Testing, Evaluation, Verification, Validation) from design to decommissioning.

title: Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC)
objective: Embed secure coding, privacy, and responsible-AI practices in all software development.

title: Human Resources
objective: Ensure personnel practices uphold confidentiality, integrity, and responsible-technology culture.

title: Ethics Oversight Committee
objective: Provide structured oversight of ethics, fairness, transparency, and human-centric decision-making for AI and technology systems.

title: Privacy Oversight Committee
objective: Provide oversight, governance, and decision authority on data-protection, privacy-by-design, and sensitive-data handling concerns.

title: Security Oversight Committee
objective: Ensure structured governance, prioritization, and strategic oversight of all cybersecurity, threat, and resilience programs.

title: Performance Metrics
objective: Establish a quantitative and qualitative measurement framework that enables leadership to monitor, evaluate, and improve organizational performance across security, privacy, AI governance, and risk domains.

title: Privacy Program
objective: Operationalize day-to-day privacy management integrated with cybersecurity and AI governance.

title: Third-Party Risk Management
objective: Identify, analyze, and manage risks originating from vendors, partners, and external service providers to protect organizational data, systems, and AI integrity.

title: AI Risk Management
objective: Establish and apply structured processes to identify, evaluate, mitigate, and track risks associated with AI systems throughout their lifecycle.

title: Cybersecurity Risk Management
objective: Continuously evaluate threats, vulnerabilities, and exposure across systems, networks, applications, and AI workloads to maintain acceptable cybersecurity posture.

title: Reporting
objective: Provide structured, timely, and risk-informed reporting to executives, the Board, regulators, and stakeholders.
